generated_oml:
instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "0.03m³ air volume styrofoam enclosure for thermal insulation"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214x214x3mm polystyrene heatbed controlled via MOSFETs with 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan for airflow control"
]

instance TemperatureSensor_Air : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring internal air temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData_Transmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor_Heatbed : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring heatbed surface temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData_Transmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor_External : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring external ambient temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData_Transmitted
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B running control software and RabbitMQ message broker"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current isolation and actuator control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit providing 12V/24V to heatbed and fan"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamBox, Heatbed, Fan, TemperatureSensor_Air, TemperatureSensor_Heatbed, TemperatureSensor_External, RaspberryPiController, PCB, PowerSupply
]

instance TemperatureData_Transmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor_Air, TemperatureSensor_Heatbed, TemperatureSensor_External
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData_Transmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, ScipyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance Model_A : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "2-parameter thermal model (C_air, G_box) assuming uniform heat transfer"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, ScipyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance Model_B : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "4-parameter thermal model (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, ScipyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for real-time data transmission between physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, MonitoringService
]

instance ScipyOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization package for parameter estimation via non-linear least squares"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance OneWireBus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire communication bus for sensor data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, MonitoringService
]

instance OpenSourceRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source repository for hardware and software components"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService, TemperaturePredictionService, MonitoringService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates thermal dynamics using Model A and Model B for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight, ControlAction
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibrates model parameters using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterEstimationInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors temperature for safety violations and triggers control actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight
]

instance SafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature deviations indicating potential safety risks"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts heating duration H or waiting duration C parameters in bang-bang control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ParameterEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized model parameters from calibration process"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected temperature thresholds exceeded during operation"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates these into GPIO signals through MOSFETs and optocouplers to control hardware components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components include RabbitMQ communication server, low-level driver, controller, and simulation models, with information flow between physical twin and digital twin via RabbitMQ queues as depicted in Figure 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated'), where the digital twin integrates deployed system models for real-time monitoring, prediction, and optimization after physical deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B validated against temperature uniformity experiments (Figure 10-12) showing better thermal inertia prediction; assumptions tested via sensor placement experiments, with residual error minimized through non-linear least squares calibration."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for inter-component communication, 1-Wire bus for sensor data transmission, and GPIO-based control signals from Raspberry Pi to PCB hardware."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server, controller, and low-level driver all deployed on the Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with hardware components connected via GPIO and PCB."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into low-level driver to maintain device safety, with controller parameters (LL, UL) enforcing temperature limits to prevent overheating and ensure operational safety."
]
